why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:add_entity must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundAddEntityPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from arbitrary entity registry contents, initialized Entity/ServerEntity behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_add_entity_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayAddEntityClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound add_entity surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table only maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00.

play_clientbound_add_entity.official_fixture: direct official ClientboundAddEntityPacket constructor with bootstrapped built-in EntityType.PIG and zero Vec3.LP movement
play_clientbound_add_entity.official_body_shape: entity id VarInt; UUID; entity type registry id; x/y/z doubles; Vec3.LP movement; x rotation byte; y rotation byte; y-head rotation byte; data VarInt

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundAddEntityPacket value constructor, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), EntityType.PIG, BuiltInRegistries.ENTITY_TYPE, and Vec3.LP_STREAM_CODEC.
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound add_entity dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet id 0x00 bundle_delimiter but not official packet id 0x01 add_entity.
Current Packet enum has no Play add_entity packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 body order.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayAddEntityClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
